title: 3rd life configurable
description: a recreation of grian's 3rd life/ last-life series in a paper plugin.
body:
# 3rd Life Configurable

a recreation of grian's 3rdlife/last-life series with a customisable configuration file.

It gives you 3 lives by defult and you can change the amount. There is also a /givelife command like in last-life. You can randomise the amount of lives people have with the /randomise command.
